title: Lincoln's Second Inaugural Address
description: A Wikisource source card for Lincoln's Second Inaugural Address.

pages.text: Lincoln's Second Inaugural Address is a compact primary source for studying wartime leadership, reconciliation, moral reasoning, and rhetorical structure.
Use this source for short close reads, sentence-level analysis, tone, allusion, and discussion about how leaders speak during crisis.
The speech is public domain, but Wikisource edition notes and linked materials should be checked before copying page-specific metadata.
